title: The Warden of Greyford
target: remove the Warden of Greyford — the petty tyrant who broke Marek's old company — from the watch-tower he holds with twenty pikemen

contributions.line: [mock] [poison-the-well] Marek (Male) takes on "set the plan, hold the party together when it sours".
[mock] [poison-the-well] Veska (Female) takes on "the violence end — door, blade, body in the way".
[mock] [poison-the-well] Imogen (Female) takes on "talk, listen, lie to the people inside the tower".

outcomeNarrative: [poison-the-well] [mock] A bruised partial; remove the Warden of Greyford — the petty tyrant who broke Marek's old company — from the watch-tower he holds with twenty pikemen slips half-grasped, but no one is broken.
approachLabel: Poison the well, take the tower at dusk
